title: Sulla Routine Manifest
description: Schema for routine.yaml — the engine-facing execution manifest for a Sulla Routine. Compatible with workflow.yaml top-level metadata conventions.

apiVersion.description: Schema API version. Fixed to sulla/v1 for this schema revision.

kind.description: Disambiguates routine.yaml from workflow.yaml (which has kind: Workflow).

id.description: Unique identifier. Must start with 'routine-' followed by the lowercase-kebab-case slug.

description.description: What the routine does and when to use it. Read by the LLM for selection.

version.description: Semver version of this routine. Immutable once published.

schemaversion.description: Format version of the routine schema itself. Bump on breaking schema changes.

enabled.description: Whether this routine is active. Mirrors workflow.yaml convention.

slug.description: Lowercase-kebab-case identifier. Must match the directory name and the id suffix.

tags.description: Classification tags for discovery and filtering.

section.description: Top-level grouping in the UI (e.g. 'Integrations', 'Standard Operating Procedures').

triggers.description: Natural-language phrases that should surface this routine to the LLM.

author.description: Email or handle of the author.

locked.description: When true, all edits require human approval (even pre-publish).

trust.description: Trust tier. Drives execution tier (shared runtime vs isolated container) and edit permissions.

immutable.description: Set to true on publish. Runtime refuses any edit that would change the signature.

spec.description: Execution specification. How the engine runs this routine.

runtime.description: Which runtime container executes this routine. 'agent' means the entrypoint is an LLM prompt, not code.

entrypoint.description:
Path to the entry function, relative to the routine root. Format depends on runtime:
- python: 'functions/main.py::handler'
- node: 'functions/main.js::handler'
- shell: 'functions/main.sh'
- agent: 'functions/prompt.md'

inputs.description: Map of input name → JSON Schema definition.

outputs.description: Map of output name → JSON Schema definition.

permissions.description: Capabilities the routine requires. Enforced by the runtime container sandbox.

network.description: Allowed outbound hosts (glob patterns, e.g. 'api.stripe.com', '*.googleapis.com'). Empty array = no network.

env.description: Environment variable names the routine may read. Values resolved from the Sulla vault at invocation time.

filesystem.description: Filesystem paths the routine may access beyond its own directory.

secrets.description: Vault secret keys the routine may request at invocation.

resources.description: Glob patterns for files in resources/ that the runtime should pre-load.

templates.description: Glob patterns for files in templates/ that the runtime should register.

ioField.description: A single input or output field. A subset of JSON Schema.

schema.description: Path to an external JSON Schema file (relative to routine root), e.g. 'resources/invoice-schema.json'.
